name: EnableControlRequest
description: EnableControlRequest schema from AWS Control Tower API

controlIdentifier.description: The ARN of the control. Only Strongly recommended and Elective controls are permitted.

targetIdentifier.description: The ARN of the organizational unit on which the control will be enabled.

parameters.description: A list of input parameter values that are supplied to enable the control.

tags.description: Tags to apply to the EnabledControl resource.
